name: Fanvibe
description:
Check-in to games to chat and trash-talk with friends who are also watching. Get scores and breaking news sent straight to your iPhone. Fanvibe covers the NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL, college basketball, college football, and the English Premier League.

Fanvibe Features Include:

-Your Sports Pulse: A custom feed with news, scores and your friendsâ€™ activity.

-Game Check-Ins: Tell your friends what youâ€™re watching and see what games your friends are watching. Never ask, â€œDid you see that game?â€ again!

-Personalized Scoreboard: Real-time scores, live game details, alerts and score updates.

-Favorites: Get news and scores for your favorite teams sent straight to your iPhone or iPod touch.

-Friend Finder: Find your friends easily by searching Facebook, Twitter and your address book.

Coming soon: March Madness brackets and World Cup coverage, Cricket, Golf and Tennis.

About Fanvibe

Fanvibe for the iPhone / iPod Touch is the first product from We The Fan, a company dedicated to building new sports products built by and for the sports fan.

It automatically convert links from these sources into embedded media on the fly.

Cue intelligently ties together and surfaces useful information at the right time from the accounts they use most, including email, contacts, and calendar. People can see their entire day at a glance or simultaneously search across all of their accounts with Cue.

description:
Gamador is a social game developer that has released three games so far. The company says that it differentiates itself from other developers by releasing quick, smart games at a very rapid pace (they can develop a game in about a week.

The company has built its own analytics platform for social games called Rankador, which they liken to a â€˜PageRank for social gamesâ€™.

name: Cardpool
description:
Cardpool is a gift card exchange marketplace where anybody can buy, sell, or trade their new or pre-owned gift cards.

Customers can buy gift cards up to 30% off their face value, sell their gift cards for up to 90% of their face value in cash, trade their gift cards for an Amazon.com Gift Card, or donate their gift card to charity. Cardpool provides free shipping for both buyers and sellers, a 100-day return policy, and policy of only selling gift cards that have no expiration date and no monthly fees.

name: Etacts
description:
Etacts was born from the frustration of keeping in touch with our ever-growing list of friends (both business and personal), family, coworkers, and clients.

It's impossible to remember to stay in touch with all the people that matter. Etacts helps you maintain your relationships by doing three things:

1) Showing you who you've lost touch with
2) Letting you set reminders to stay in touch with people
3) Helping you get back in touch meaningfully by giving you relevant context about your relationship with people, such as the last emails you exchanged, or their recent status updates.

Use Etacts to build and maintain relationships with former friends, business partners, clients, and more!

name: Data Marketplace
description:
Data Marketplace helps people find, buy and sell data online. It helps users seeking a specific data to creating a request for free, explain their needs, add an optional deadline and budget, and in turn allows aggregators respond with relevant data for purchase. All of the data on Data Marketplace is available for immediate purchase and download. They provide data in standard formats (e.g. Excel, CSV, XML, JSON) .

Data Marketplace is funded by Y Combinator.

name: Newslabs
description: NewsLabs offers a platform that looks to help "old school" journalists adapt to the web, by giving them help with advertising, SEO, and other issues they may not have had to deal with before.

name: Notifo
description: Notifo is a mobile application and platform which allows any web site or service to easily create mobile notifications. While it's currently only an iPhone app, the plan is to eventually work on Android and BlackBerry devices too.

name: Boomerang
description: Developer of an e-mail productivity software designed to encourage people to be productive. The company's software analyzes the selected e-mail messages and searches across the enterprise through shared network drives and Sharepoint sites and displays related documents, enabling companies to work efficiently and save time.

name: DemandSphere
description: Developer of a hybrid content marketing and strategy platform designed to help accelerate growth potential through content marketing, and digital strategy.

name: Elevate
description: Developer of cognitive training tool designed to build communication and analytical skills. The company's tool offers flexible training, unlimited access, and performance tracking all through games to improve critical skills, enabling users to boost productivity and earn skills and self-confidence.

name: ExCo
description: Provider of an online payment platform and loan service designed to give consumers peace of mind and increase conversion and sales. The company's platform offers to make cardless e-commerce payments and helps in peer-to-peer lending, enabling consumers to boost conversion and live profitably.

name: Presto
description: Presto Automation Inc overlays next-gen digital solutions onto the physical world. It provides an accurate, next-gen solution that uses artificial intelligence to automate speech recognition for restaurant drive-thru. The Company earns substantially all of its revenue in the United States.

name: Styleseat
description: Operator of the premier marketplace for independent beauty professionals intended to empower professionals and connect them with clients. The company offers seamless booking and business management tools, enabling clients to discover and book beauty services with ease while allowing professionals to manage their businesses and grow their clientele.

name: Zappli
description: Provider of a mobile-centric shopping features for consumer. The company enables consumers to create a universal account and buy from dozens of retailers in every single click.

name: Tello
description: Developer of SaaS and mobile application for customer feedback. The company provides web and mobile service that aggregates ratings for businesses from across the web and allows users to post comments about their experience at a business.

name: Estately
description: Operator of a real estate property search website designed to find houses for sale in the United States. The company's real estate property search website offers real estate property listing services where people can search for information on houses for sale on a map and view detailed descriptions, enabling users to choose their perfect home for buying.

name: Wildfire
description: Developer of social media marketing software. The company helps corporations, small businesses, marketing agencies, bloggers and non-profits to create their own branded interactive promotions, such as sweepstakes, contests, give-aways and incentive-based surveys, as well as to simultaneously publish them in various social networks and on their website.

name: TaskDock
description: Developer of a solution that helps integrate applications such as Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and the web with mobile devices.

name: Flowtown
description: Flowtown is a social media marketing platform that helps businesses communicate with their customers.

name: Recurly
description: Provider of a subscription billing services platform designed to deliver recurring billing automation. The company's pay-as-you-go subscription billing platform Recurly, offers professional billing, customizable hosted billing pages, account management and helps companies to eliminate cost and complexity required to manage subscription billing operations enabling customers to properly account for their subscription revenue and close the books quickly and accurately each month.

name: Oneforty
description: Developer of social media management platform, SocialBase and the web's extensive listing of social media tools. The company develops an online clearinghouse of applications related to Twitter.

name: LookSharp
description: Provider of a job searching platform designed to connect students and recent graduates with employers. The company's job searching platform is a internship and entry-level jobs marketplace where students find resources and opportunities, enabling its users to secure jobs and create a professional career.

name: Freejit
description: Provider of services intended to capturing key insights through real-time feedback, intelligent reporting, and in-depth analysis. The company's services are customizable and adaptive, offer possible engagement experience and helps to understand the unique needs, intentions and frustrations of their website, enabling marketers to serve the needs of website visitors and gain the power to unlock enormous and untapped revenue growth in their businesses.

name: Flywire
description: Developer of an online payment platform designed to streamline the international and domestic payment experience. The company's platform fully reconciles global payments and offers scope for global refunding while keeping all parties updated throughout the process in education, healthcare and business transactions, enabling clients to get fast, secure and convenient payments collections from all over the world and different currencies.

name: Forrst
description: Provider of online community for website developers and designers. The company offers its community to help themselves and others get better at their craft by providing critiques and sharing their knowledge to build applications and websites.

name: Limbo Labs
description: Developer of a financial software to manage debt. The company has developed a financial software which allows its users to track their debt, make payments and monitor credit.

name: Amped
description: Developer of a mobile application designed to offer event updates and ticket booking. The company's mobile application uses data analytics and machine learning to discover and recommend relevant concerts, theater productions, sports games and community events, enabling artists to identify, understand and engage fan base.

name: AppBistro
description: Provider of tab application marketplace. The company offers Business Application Marketplace where developers, small businesses, brands and agencies buy, sell and review Facebook Applications.

name: Zencoder
description: Provider of cloud-based video encoding software. The company provides web-based video encoding software as a service, designed to convert any video into web and mobile compatible formats. It is for web sites and applications that accept uploaded videos and need to encode them to standard formats.

name: Linkdex
description: Developer of an enterprise data platform designed to improve search engine visibility. The company's activities include providing a combined search intelligence platform along with advanced tools to improve rankings, traffic and revenues online, enabling businesses, brands and agencies to grow and lead the increasingly critical SEO channel.

name: SendGrid
description: Provider of mobile and cloud-based email service platform designed to deliver customer communication that drives engagement and business growth. The company's email service platform integrates via API, SMTP or builds and sends email campaigns using online email marketing tools, enabling enterprises to increase email deliverability, to access actionable insight and scale itself to meet any volume of email.

name: SiteJabber
description: Developer of a product review platform designed to help customers to share ratings and reviews of businesses. The company's product review platform organizes the negative reviews and positive reviews to provides a rating of the product on that basis, enabling users to get an idea of the product quality before buying.

name: EcoMom
description: Operator of an online shopping portal that recommends and sells eco-conscious products for children. The company offers baby care, holiday, bath and body, feeding and nursing, and health and wellness products, as well as organic baby food, toys, books, clothing and gifts.

name: MoonFruit
description: Developer and designer of websites. The company is engaged in the designing, customization, styling and layout of websites that reflects a particular company's brand.

name: Gazehawk
description: Provider of eye tracking services using ordinary Webcams. The company offers an eye tracking technology that allows Web designers and publishers to see how visitors view their Webpage, advertisement or image.

name: Gengo
description: Provider of online language translation services designed to help people to translate all the content in a few clicks. The company's online language translation services offer to upload files or input text, select the translation languages and level to receive an instant quote, as well as offers to give translators any relevant details or specific instructions about project, enabling clients to track their work progress and communicate directly with translators.

name: Viki
description: Provider of online video services. The company provides a platform for streaming premium TV shows and movies, as well as crowdsourcing subtitles in more than 160 languages.

name: Rapportive
description: Provider of contextual information about GMail contacts. The company provides a plug-in that shows information about contacts inside the Gmail inbox. It also provides imagine relationship management built into email systems.

name: Simple
description: Provider of banking services through Web and mobile applications. The company works in partnership with financial institutions that hold the actual deposits. It also offers deposit, money transfer and online bill payment services.

name: Apsalar
description: Developer of a mobile application attribution and audience management platform designed to drive engagement and monetization through data-driven marketing. The company's Apsalar Mobile Marketing Cloud provides the critical data layer for customized marketing based on the actions and needs of each individual app user, providing both essential business and user insights along with audience tools to power customized, data-driven marketing.

name: Cardmunch
description: Provider of mobile business card transcription services. The company's application helps customers to capture images of their business cards, as well as helps customers to capture images automatically, manage dual address books, and sync contacts.

name: Graphicly
description: Provider of digital content conversion and distribution services. The company provides a platform for authors and publishers that offers work flow integration, self-publishing, digital distribution, conversion and promotion for digital content.

name: Lready
description: Provider of a location and communication smartphone application intended to keep millions of families and close friends connected. The company's location and communication application addresses the immediate concerns of parents and rapidly redefining the safety and security landscape, enabling users to see where family members are on a private map, get help in an emergency and group chat.

name: Humanoid
description: Developer of a human brainpower API (Application Programming Interface) that enables engineers to create tasks and send instructions to humans. The company offers computer programmers a way to use human intelligence in software applications.

name: Gantto
description: Provider of project management tool which uses gantt chart for visual representation. The company's platform enables users to create their own charts and presentations to show project progress and management.

name: Homeboodle
description: Provider of an online marketplace to find apartments. The company combine a consumer destination site for buyers of new homes with a database of photos, property descriptions, house plans and community information.

name: Retailigence
description: Developer of Online-to-Offline (O2O) local marketing and commerce platform. The company provides in-store product data and location services for facilitating a shopper's path-to-purchase in brick-and-mortar stores.

name: TransFS
description: Provider of an online marketplace for credit-card processors. The company provides a platform for merchants to shop and compare bids from multiple providers of credit-card processing services.

name: Crocodoc
description: Provider of tool to view and comment on PDF, Word document, and PowerPoint presentation. The company provides a tool to upload and convert them into (Hyper Text Mark-up Language) HTML5 so that you can easily embed them on web site. It also provide mark-up, share and review documents and presentations.

name: Brainient
description: Provider of video advertising technology platform. The company develops tools to create interactive video formats which can be delivered across a range of devices and reported on in real-time.

name: Payvment
description: Payvment is an e-commerce site designed for Facebook offering brands and merchants a complete suite of social discovery and commerce tools.

name: Backtype
description: Operator of a search engine that enables the users to find, follow, and share comments from blogs and social news sites on the Web. The company also enables to search query results by RSS feeds and emails.

name: OneTrueFan
description: Provider of an online service for web publishers. The company offers an online service that enables site visitors to earn badges and points for interacting and sharing content on the site.

name: Makerbot
description: Provider of desktop Three-dimensional(3D) printing technology. The company manufactures Three-dimensional(3D) desktop printers and components, as well as providing the MakerBot 3D Ecosystem, an online platform of 3D printing tools, including Thingiverse, a crowdsourced collection of downloadable digital designs.

name: Foodspotting
description: Foodspotting is a community-driven dish discovery app that allows individuals to find, share and recommend food dishes.

name: Otherinbox
description: Provider of domain name services to Web users. The company provides email account hosting services to consumers. Additionally, it offers newsletters, social networking updates, and online purchase receipts and coupons organizing services.

name: Erply
description: Provider of cloud-based point of sale and inventory management software designed to help retailers to focus more on business and less on IT. The company's point of sale and inventory management software handles data across physical shops, online stores and offices along with real-time dashboards with relevant data, enabling clients to use a cost effective and technologically superior way for handing centralized management experience.

name: Plancast
description: Developer of software for social web applications. The company is known for creating the social event discovery service Plancast.

name: Mogotix
description: Provider of a mobile ticketing service for events. The company's services are used to send event tickets to attendees' cell phones through text messages for parties, fundraisers and conferences.

name: Waffl
description: Postling is a social market service provider thatallows users to publish on multiple networking sites through one centralized location.

name: Votizen
description: Provider of a platform for U.S. political engagement. The company is a provider of media content focused on U.S. federal, state and local processes and citizen engagement in democracy.

name: Khush
description: Developer of music applications for mobile phones. The company's application analyzes the user's voice and composes music to match.
